title: The Global Exposure by PhotoZone Graphy
description: The Global Exposure is an international photography contest organized by PhotoZone Graphy, open to participants from all around the world. With no fixed theme, photographers are free to submit images from any category or style. All submissions will be carefully reviewed and filtered by an international jury panel. Participants and winners will receive digital certificates.

title: General Knowledge Olympiad
description: General knowledge forms the cornerstone of an informed and successful career. In a rapidly evolving world where education, innovation, technology, and information are continuously transforming remaining well informed is not just valuable, but essential. To foster intellectual growth and empower the next generation of leaders. Buniad is proud to introduce the General Knowledge Olympiad a prestigious national level competition designed to celebrate academic excellence and awareness.

title: bdapps Innovation Summit 2025
description: bdapps Innovation Summit 2025 is not just about ideas — it’s about rewarding innovation that can shape Bangladesh’s digital future. Whether you're aiming for the top or breaking into the top 10, there’s a prize waiting for you. Turn your app idea into impact — and income!

title: Bangladesh Economics Olympiad 2025
description: BDEO is an annual national competition on Economics, Financial Literacy, and Business Case Solving for high school (O-Level) and college-level (A-Level) students. The top-performing students will represent Bangladesh at the International Economics Olympiad 2025, Azerbaijan and other prestigious international events. University students can also participate but are only eligible up to national level.
eligibility: High School (O-Level) & College (A-Level) Students; University Students up to national round

title: International Astronomy and Astrophysics Competition 2025
description: An International competition on Astronomy and Astrophysics for high school and university students worldwide.

title: International Quant Championship 2025
description: WorldQuant BRAIN's 2025 International Quant Championship is now open to individuals and teams of 1 to 4 people. Join WorldQuant's flagship quant competition and compete for cash prizes from a pool of $100,000 and the potential to be considered for internships and consultant positions.
eligibility: individuals and teams of 1 to 4 people

title: Agent X
description: Agent X is an AI Prompting Competition presented by NetCom Learning and Powered by Microsoft.
